Elantra > Body and Frame > Quarter Panel > Corrosion Protection

CORROSION PROTECTION PROCEDURE
Hyundai Elantra 2023

ANTI-CORROSION REQUIREMENTS
Apply rust preventative to all inner cavities after panel installation.
Body sealant: Apply seam sealer to all panel joints per Hyundai specification.
Cavity wax: Inject into inner quarter panel cavity after all welding.
Anti-corrosion primer: Apply to all bare metal surfaces before topcoat.

SEAM SEALER APPLICATION
Rocker to quarter joint:     Apply 8mm bead seam sealer, tool smooth.
Quarter to wheel arch flange: Apply body sealant and feather edges.
D-pillar flange inner:       Apply underbody coating 2mm min thickness.

ELECTROCOAT AND PRIMER
Note: Galvanized panels require zinc-compatible primer.
Apply electrocoat primer to all repaired bare metal areas.
Corrosion protection must be completed before paint application.

Hyundai requires corrosion protection in all collision-affected cavities.
Rust treatment required on any corrosion found during disassembly.
